{
  unkbyte10 in_ST0;
  unkbyte10 in_ST1;
  undefined2 in_stack_ffffffea;
  
  FUN_00455300((int)in_ST0,(uint)((unkuint10)in_ST0 >> 0x20),(ushort)((unkuint10)in_ST0 >> 0x40),
